eval_notes.conflict_metrics_note: Conflict F1 is aggregated only for samples that are not conflict_eval_skipped: GT conflict rows without a non-empty eval_existing_tasks fixture are excluded so the metric is not artificially zero. Rows with a fixture exercise validate-node conflict detection.
eval_notes.langsmith_hint: Each LLM call is logged as groq_chat_completion; each document as pipeline_run_trace. Filter by session name above; per-sample via inputs.sample_id.
